comment: Single source of truth for the test matrix. Backends x suites. The runner (run.mjs), the aggregator (aggregate.mjs) and CI all read this.

backends.label: JavaScriptCore
backends.comment: WebKit JSCOnly built from source. The shippable engine.

suites.label: rusty_v8 API
suites.comment: Vendored rusty_v8 integration tests run unmodified against our v8 shim (see [[test]] entries in Cargo.toml). Cheapest: no deno.

suites.label: deno_core
suites.comment: cargo test -p deno_core in the patched deno checkout. Links our v8 shim but does NOT build the full deno binary.
suites.ignore_comment: Known-flaky tests, quarantined from the ratchet: NEVER run (skipped up-front) and excluded from pass/fail/baseline, so the cell is deterministic. `ignore` applies to all backends; `ignore_by_backend` adds per-backend ones. Bare libtest paths (no `deno_core::` prefix). dyn_import_recurse_err overflows the stack non-deterministically on quickjs (ASLR-dependent recursion depth) and, by aborting the single-process run at a random point, makes every later test's pass/hang order-dependent — quarantining it on quickjs makes that cell reproducible. (It is fixed on the JSC backends by the margin-probe in #22, so it is NOT quarantined there.)
